title: Contract QP vs In-House QP
alt: Side-by-side comparison of contract and in-house Qualified Person models across cost, risk and control

left.heading: Contract QP
points: Variable cost; pay per certification activity
Suits low or variable batch volumes
Fits importers, start-ups and vacancy cover

right.heading: In-House QP
points: Fully loaded salary plus cover costs
Wins on cost at high, steady throughput
Deep familiarity with one product range
